key_risks: Weaker-than-expected May employment report on June 5 could trigger broad risk-off rotation
Hotter ISM Services PMI on June 3 may reinforce inflation concerns and pressure valuations
Profit-taking after strong trailing tech returns could lead to short-term reversal

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent momentum and positive manufacturing PMI/ durable goods data support continued tech outperformance over one week.
Semiconductor sales growth and AI infrastructure forecasts provide near-term catalyst support ahead of employment data.
Elevated software spending trends and trailing outperformance position for continuation in short window.
Factor has shown resilience and aligns with growth-oriented rotation observed in recent returns.
AI spending projections and sector breadth add targeted exposure without over-concentration.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated tilt to tech/AI/momentum captures growth momentum from ISM, orders, and AI forecasts while staying within 5 holdings for the one-week window.
rationale_summary: Focus on sectors with recent strength and supportive macro prints to maximize expected close-to-close return versus SP500.
